---
title: "About Me"
---

## Background
Hello! I am Aidan Mistry, a fourth year student currently studnying at Dublin City University. For my first and secind year of school I studied at Brock University in Ontario Canada. Ranging from my thesis to machine learning algorithms this portfolio is a collection of works I've developed during my time in college. In my free time I enjoy watching theatre, playing soccer, reading and brain puzzles.

## Skills
Here are some of the skills I've been able to develop this year
* **Tech Skills:** Python, HTML?CSS, Quarto
* **Tools:** Git, GitHub, VS Code

## Skills
In all my years of college I have been able to develop skills in 
* Research
* Human Resources
* Finance
* Marketing
* Operations

## Goals
My primary goal is to return to Brock University and complete the final courses of my degree.
In the long-term I hope to pursue a career in consulting or operations.
